title: Buyer creates a Capital PO — data-triggered splice from po_type
user_persona: Capital projects buyer ordering a fixed asset

conversation.user: I need to create a Capital PO for a new milling machine from supplier SUP-CAP-1.

bot_must: note that Capital triggers additional required slots: capital_proposal_id (the approved capital proposal/project)
validate the proposal exists and is approved (look-up against the proposal master)
fire PoCrtMain INIT/UI tasks that load Capital-related defaults
continue collecting remaining standard header slots (numbering_series, po_date, currency, buyer)

conversation.user: Numbering series PO/CAP/2026, today, USD, buyer BUY-77. One line: ITM-MILL-X, 1 unit at 75000.

bot_must: remind that Capital POs typically need explicit approval (no TRN4 self-approval), so will use POCRTMAINSBT then route through PoApp
note next step is PoApp by a capital-projects approver

evaluation_metrics.additional_slot_request: capital_proposal_id must be asked before commit
